claim_text: Lilly reported Q1 2026 revenue of $19.799 billion, up 56% year over year.
notes: Official earnings release furnished as SEC 8-K Exhibit 99.

claim_text: Q1 2026 worldwide revenue growth was driven by 65% volume growth, partially offset by a 13% lower realized-price effect.
Mounjaro Q1 2026 revenue was $8.662 billion, up 125% year over year.
Zepbound Q1 2026 revenue was $4.160 billion, up 80% year over year.
Key Products revenue grew to $13.4 billion in Q1 2026, led by Mounjaro and Zepbound.
notes: Shows GLP-1 concentration inside growth engine.

claim_text: Q1 2026 gross margin was $16.2 billion and 81.9% of revenue, down 0.6 percentage points year over year, primarily due to lower realized prices.
notes: Pricing pressure is visible even with strong growth.

claim_text: Lilly raised 2026 revenue guidance to $82.0-$85.0 billion and non-GAAP EPS guidance to $35.50-$37.00.
notes: Company guidance midpoint used in expectation map.

claim_text: Lilly said U.S. FDA approved Foundayo (orforglipron) for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.
notes: Company regulatory claim; should be backed by FDA source before external publication.

claim_text: StockAnalysis showed LLY closing at $1,105.00 on May 29 2026 with market cap of $985.37 billion, enterprise value of $1.02 trillion, forward P/E of 29.72x, EV/Sales of 14.16x and EV/FCF of 86.53x.
notes: Third-party market data; refresh before live investment use.

claim_text: StockAnalysis/Finnhub showed FY2026 revenue estimate of $86.26 billion, FY2027 revenue estimate of $100.11 billion, FY2026 EPS estimate of $36.98 and FY2027 EPS estimate of $45.12.
notes: Consensus source; EPS may be non-GAAP.

claim_text: StockAnalysis showed Novo Nordisk market cap of $202.87 billion, enterprise value of $222.36 billion, forward P/E of 14.41x, EV/Sales of 4.40x and EV/FCF of 23.59x.
notes: Peer comparison is imperfect because NVO ADR financial currency and growth profile differ materially.

claim_text: Using $1,105.00 per share and Lilly 2026 non-GAAP EPS guidance midpoint of $36.25, LLY traded at approximately 30.5x company 2026 non-GAAP EPS guidance.
FDA announced approval of Foundayo on 2026-04-01 for chronic weight management in adults with obesity or adults with overweight and at least one weight-related comorbid condition.
notes: Closes the initial FDA-source gap for Foundayo approval.

claim_text: FDA prescribing information for Foundayo lists once-daily oral dosing, obesity/overweight indication and key safety warnings including thyroid C-cell tumor boxed warning and GLP-1 class precautions.
notes: Label details matter for product-reality monitoring and safety/regulatory refresh.

claim_text: Lilly said on 2026-05-28 that all three largest US PBMs would cover its full obesity medicine portfolio; CVS Caremark Commercial Template coverage for Foundayo begins 2026-06-01 and Zepbound access broadens by 2026-10-01.
notes: Positive access milestone but needs payer-side confirmation and rebate/gross-to-net evidence.

claim_text: CVS Health said CVS Caremark will remove the new-to-market block on Foundayo effective 2026-06-01 where approved by plans and add Zepbound back to commercial formularies as an additional preferred option on 2026-10-01.
notes: Confirms one major PBM path but not all three PBMs.

claim_text: CMS says the Medicare GLP-1 Bridge will begin 2026-07-01 and provide eligible Medicare Part D beneficiaries access to certain GLP-1 drugs through 2027, with prior authorization criteria; CMS lists Foundayo and Zepbound KwikPen as eligible products.
notes: Improves government access evidence but adds prior authorization and program-implementation monitoring.
